name: Juice Shop — SSRF: server fetches an attacker-supplied imageUrl

provenance.note: Vulnerable side is verbatim-real Juice Shop master; safe baseline reconstructed (Juice Shop ships no in-repo fix). Challenge: SSRF.

notes: url = req.body.imageUrl is passed directly to fetch(url) with no scheme/host allowlist, letting an attacker make the server request internal services or cloud metadata endpoints. Fix validates the URL against an https host allowlist before fetch.
